subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Through divine bounties, mayest thou be safe and at rest. We have sent Munírih [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه انشاء الله بعنایت رحمانیه سالم و مستریح باشی منیره را فرستادیم
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @education of children; moral education
